h1.visual_description: Red, sans-serif, right-aligned text located in the top margin, denoting a major document section.

h2.visual_description: Red, all-caps, bold serif font, left-aligned, used specifically for table titles.
h2.example_text: TABLE 35: UNION-STATE BREAKDOWN OF IMPRISONMENT CLAUSES BY CATEGORIES

visual_matchers.pattern: Red background with white bold serif text
Alternating light peach and white background rows
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table data rows for visual separation

visual_matchers.pattern: Small black serif text starting with an asterisk immediately below a table
Red centered numeral at the bottom of the page

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Section header 'Appendices' in the top right margin and page number in the bottom center margin.
